---
title: "Dr James Manby Gully"
---

## Dr James Manby Gully

**Dates:** (1808-1883)

### Description

physician

### Biography

He founded Malvern hydropathic establishment in the early 1840s, but was ruined by the Bravo case of 1876, which revealed he had had an affair with a patient.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 17th [1876]
- Letter from October 5, 1868
- Letter from Sept 21 [1868[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from May 23d 1861
- Letter from April 21 1857

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
